overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The character navigates red bike lanes, crosses multiple intersections, and pauses to look up at a towering hotel building with bright holographic signage before continuing across a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bike lane adjacent to construction site

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red bike lane, passing pedestrians and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking in same direction

entered.detail: tall construction barriers with blue and red coloring lining the left side of the path
tall palm tree visible above the construction barriers
large illuminated holographic advertisements on distant buildings
tall street lamps illuminating the rainy street
rain-slicked red pavement reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked red bike lane at night, passing blue and red construction barriers on the left. Neon holographic billboards glow in the distance against the dark skyline, and sparse pedestrians share the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crossing under elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway overpass, lighting becomes dimmer
turns left while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning left to walk under the overpass structure

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows overhead
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a street and enters the shadowy space beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed ambiance as rain continues to fall, and white crosswalk stripes mark the asphalt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits underpass into open intersection with bright neon lighting
waits for black vehicle to pass before continuing across intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, waiting for traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with distinctive architecture and signage
vertical pink neon sign reading HOTEL on building facade
large digital advertisement screen on building
small tree with white foliage on the median
broad yellow and black striped crosswalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a vast neon-lit intersection, the character crosses yellow-striped crosswalks while a black car passes by. A prominent hotel building with vertical pink neon signage dominates the right side, and holographic billboards illuminate the rainy scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with hotel entrance and vending machines

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the top of the hotel building
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: stopping at the corner to look up at the towering hotel building with neon signage

entered.detail: blue neon sign with Japanese characters ホテル
row of illuminated vending machines on the sidewalk
walk signal showing yellow pedestrian symbol
massive red neon circular structure at the very top of the skyscraper

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the hotel corner, where blue and pink neon signs illuminate the entrance. The camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal a massive red neon structure at the building's summit, then tilts back down to street level where vending machines glow on the sidewalk.

events.description: begins crossing the street after observing the building

agents.ego_description: crossing the street with other pedestrians, heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing together ahead

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, leaving the hotel behind. Other pedestrians walk ahead toward the far sidewalk as holographic countdown numbers project onto the wet pavement, and the camera moves steadily forward through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban district that transitions from a narrow transit path into a towering neon-lit intersection. It begins with the character walking along a red bike lane past construction barriers, moving toward a dark skyline punctuated by glowing holographic billboards. As the character crosses the street, the scene shifts into the shadowy depths beneath a massive elevated highway overpass before emerging back into the vibrant light of a vast intersection. The camera then pauses at a hotel corner, tilting dramatically upward to reveal a massive red neon structure at the building's summit before returning to street level to capture glowing vending machines. Finally, the movement continues forward across yellow-striped crosswalks, passing holographic countdown numbers projected onto the wet pavement as the character heads toward the far sidewalk.
